title: Call for Proposals on Specified Topics in Emerging Tech, Economics and Trade, and China’s Activities in India and Latin America, or Other Novel Ideas
description: The Commission invites submission of proposals to provide concise unclassified reports in emerging technology, economics and trade, China’s activities in India and Latin America, or other novel ideas.
text:
The U.S.-China Economic and Security Review Commission issued a Call For Proposals (CFP) and invites submission of proposals to provide concise unclassified reports in the following areas of interest:
Specified Topics in Emerging Technology
Specified Topics in Economics, Trade and Investment
China’s Malign Influence Activities in India or Latin America
Other Novel Ideas
Background: The Commission periodically contracts for research on issues where third parties have specialized expertise or knowledge as a supplement to the work of Commission staff. These research reports are made public and generally briefed out to interested congressional committees and offices.
Successful proposals will address the offeror’s ability to respond to the proposed scope of work and identify areas in the Commission’s statutory mandate in which the offeror can conduct research, as well as the areas the offeror would likely subcontract with third parties to produce.
Proposals will be reviewed on a rolling basis and must be submitted by 5:00 p.m. (ET) on January 30, 2026.
